meta.productClass: EU-targeted, multi-locale, SSR affiliate price-comparison web app (Next.js 14 App Router + Supabase + next-intl), GDPR/AEO-positioned

decisions.B_cookie: ADOPT FOSS vanilla-cookieconsent@3.1.0 (MIT, verified via npm)
decisions.C_legal: SCAFFOLD i18n plumbing + structured keys + machine-translate all 13 locales; flag binding copy + real Impressum for legal sign-off

params.spine: ingest writes slug -> deal page resolves by slug -> live-path price-drop alert dispatch -> one-click unsubscribe POST
params.verificationTier: A for structure/coverage/counts (validate_plan.mjs) + build-health (tsc, next build); B (reasoned) for NL contradiction/vacuity; C for adversarial red-team (independent agent)

baseline.item: At least one real live data feed ingested
Normalization to a single typed model; no untyped data
Graceful mock/degraded fallback when credentials absent
Scheduled refresh bounded by a runtime budget
Affiliate link decoration with tracking subID
SSR detail pages addressable by stable slug
schema.org structured data valid for rich results
rel=sponsored nofollow on monetized outbound links
All user-facing strings localized across supported locales
Affiliate disclosure adjacent to monetized links
Secrets management; no hardcoded default secrets
Data minimization / transient geo / no PII where avoidable
Unit tests for core pure logic

requirements.story: As the platform, I ingest live deals from Strackr so multi-network coverage is real.
requirements.text: WHEN /api/refresh runs with STRACKR_API_KEY present THEN the system SHALL fetch from the Strackr publisher endpoint and map each result into NormalizedDeal.
acceptance: src/lib/providers/strackr.ts exports a StrackrProvider implementing PriceProvider
with STRACKR_API_KEY unset init() returns {ok:true,isMock:true} and fetchDeals returns generateMockDeals (0 network calls)
StrackrProvider is present in ALL_PROVIDERS (registry.ts) and tsc --noEmit exit 0
discountPercent is derived via the shared computeDiscountPercent guard, not an unguarded inline formula

requirements.story: As the dedup engine, I receive eanCode so cross-merchant matching works.
requirements.text: WHILE normalizing a provider/feed record that exposes a GTIN/EAN field the system SHALL populate NormalizedDeal.eanCode (else null).
acceptance: grep shows >=2 providers and scripts/ingest-awin.cjs assign eanCode/ean_code from the source GTIN field
a unit test asserts two records with equal EAN from different merchants dedupe to 1 survivor

requirements.story: As the dedup engine, I keep the best single offer per product deterministically.
requirements.text: IF two deals share an EAN (or slugified name+merchant when EAN is null) THEN the system SHALL keep the lower salePrice, breaking exact-price ties by lower provider priority.
acceptance: registry dedup contains an explicit equal-price tie-break on provider priority (not iteration order)
3 unit tests pass: EAN-survivor, name+merchant fallback, price-tie -> priority

requirements.story: As a buyer, every live deal has a routable slug so its page opens.
requirements.text: WHEN scripts/ingest-awin.cjs upserts a deal THEN the system SHALL write a non-null slug using the canonical generation rule slugify(name)+'-'+sanitized(productId).
acceptance: normalizeRow output object contains a non-empty slug key
after a dry-run, 0 rows have slug=null
the written slug equals deals.repo.ts toRow() generation for the same input
discount_percent is derived via the shared computeDiscountPercent guard (or a documented equivalent), not an unguarded inline formula (closes GAP-4)

requirements.story: As the analyst, daily price snapshots exist even when price is unchanged.
requirements.text: WHEN a deal row is inserted or its sale_price updated THEN the system SHALL record a price_history row if the price changed (NULL-safe) OR no snapshot exists for that product on the current date.
acceptance: record_price_history() includes a 'no row today' branch and uses IS DISTINCT FROM
after two same-day same-price upserts exactly 1 snapshot exists; after a next-day upsert a 2nd snapshot exists

requirements.story: As the UI, the 90-day low is cached on each deal.
requirements.text: WHILE executing the scheduled refresh the system SHALL recompute deals.historical_low_price from price_history over a 90-day window.
acceptance: refresh path awaits update_historical_lows_batch RPC
after refresh, historical_low_price = MIN(sale_price) over recorded_at>=now()-90d

requirements.story: As a dev, the app runs with an empty .env on mock data.
requirements.text: IF provider credentials and Supabase are absent THEN the system SHALL serve mock deals on every page without throwing.
acceptance: next build with empty env exits 0
each provider init() logs a mock warning and returns isMock:true
no unhandled exception on home/category/search/deal navigation

requirements.story: As ops, the refresh completes within its serverless budget under live latency.
requirements.text: WHILE refreshing all country x category combinations the system SHALL bound wall-clock within maxDuration=300s using bounded concurrency.
acceptance: refresh fans out with a concurrency limit (>1, configurable) rather than 160 strictly-serial awaits
maxDuration=300 retained
a smoke run over mock data completes < 60s

requirements.story: As finance, outbound links carry a unified subID per network.
requirements.text: The system SHALL decorate outbound affiliate URLs with subID dealradar_{country}_{category}_{productId} mapped to kelkoo=custom1, awin=clickref, tradedoubler=epi.
acceptance: decorateAffiliateUrl output URL contains the network-correct param with the subID
the param value round-trips to the original productId via the postback parser (R-MON-3)

requirements.story: As finance, conversion postbacks are authenticated and persisted.
requirements.text: WHEN /api/postbacks receives a POST THEN the system SHALL require secret==WEBHOOK_SECRET via a timing-safe comparison and persist a transactions row, returning 200/401/400.
acceptance: comparison uses crypto.timingSafeEqual over length-guarded buffers
WEBHOOK_SECRET unset -> 401 (no CRON_SECRET fallback that grants access)
valid secret + body -> 200 and 1 transactions row

requirements.story: As finance, every network's postback attributes to the right product.
requirements.text: IF a postback carries a subID for any supported network THEN the system SHALL extract productId network-aware and reject invalid status/commission.
acceptance: parser reads the network-correct field (subid3/custom1/clickref/epi) case-insensitively
status not in {pending,approved,declined,paid} -> 400; commission not finite or <0 -> 400
reconstructed productId equals the original for ids containing ':' and '-'

requirements.story: As finance, the transactions table has integrity constraints + audit fields.
requirements.text: The system SHALL define transactions with a product_id FK (ON DELETE SET NULL), subid3, raw_payload jsonb, received_at, and CHECK constraints on commission_earned>=0 and status enum.
acceptance: schema.sql transactions has the FK, subid3, raw_payload, received_at, and both CHECKs
an INSERT with status='garbage' or commission=-1 is rejected by the DB

requirements.story: As a buyer, an invalid deal URL shows a 404.
requirements.text: WHEN a deal page is requested with an unknown slug THEN the system SHALL call notFound() and render the standard 404.
acceptance: getDealBySlug returns null for unknown slug
/<locale>/deal/<bogus> returns HTTP 404

requirements.story: As a buyer, the slug a link points to is the slug the page resolves.
requirements.text: The system SHALL guarantee a non-null slug on every persisted deal and resolve it via getDealBySlug for all write paths (ingest + refresh upsert).
acceptance: schema enforces slug NOT NULL (constraint or BEFORE-INSERT default)
a backfill UPDATE sets slug for all pre-existing rows
for a live-ingested deal, the DealCard href slug returns HTTP 200

requirements.story: As a maintainer, dead modal code is removed after SSR migration.
requirements.text: The system SHALL route deal navigation through the SSR page and contain no import of the removed DealDetailModal.
acceptance: grep for DealDetailModal returns 0 matches
DealCard navigates via next/link to /<locale>/deal/<slug>

requirements.story: As an answer engine, deal pages expose valid AggregateOffer markup.
requirements.text: The system SHALL emit JSON-LD Product + AggregateOffer including priceCurrency, lowPrice, highPrice, offerCount, availability=InStock, and per-offer itemCondition=NewCondition.
acceptance: JSON-LD contains @type AggregateOffer with lowPrice/highPrice/offerCount
JSON-LD contains itemCondition https://schema.org/NewCondition
Google Rich Results Test reports 0 errors for a sample deal page

requirements.story: As an answer engine, deal pages carry extractable price-proof text.
requirements.text: The system SHALL render visible (non-CSS-hidden) proof text on each deal page: a 90-day-low statement and a 'Verified at <time> CET' timestamp.
acceptance: page HTML contains a localized 90-day-low line driven by historicalLowPrice
page HTML contains a verification timestamp from lastUpdated
neither element uses display:none / sr-only
historical_low_price is read with a != null check (deals.repo fromRow) so a genuine 0 low is shown, not collapsed to null (closes the historicalLowPrice===0 finding)

requirements.story: As an AI crawler, robots.txt explicitly invites me.
requirements.text: The system SHALL serve robots.txt with explicit Allow groups for OAI-SearchBot, PerplexityBot, Google-Extended, a global Disallow: /api/, and a Sitemap directive.
acceptance: robots.txt contains the 3 named user-agent groups each with Allow: /
contains Disallow: /api/ and Sitemap: <abs-url>

requirements.story: As search, the sitemap lists valid, resolvable, cross-linked URLs.
requirements.text: The system SHALL generate sitemap.xml using the canonical LOCALES set, Supabase-sourced deal slugs across all supported countries, and per-URL hreflang alternates.
acceptance: locale list is imported from i18n/routing (no 'se'; includes 'sv')
deal entries use the persisted Supabase slug (resolve to 200, not 404)
each logical page emits alternates.languages with an x-default

requirements.story: As search, each deal page declares its canonical + locale alternates.
requirements.text: The system SHALL set generateMetadata canonical plus alternates.languages for all 13 locales on the deal page.
acceptance: metadata.alternates.languages has 13 entries + x-default
canonical host matches the deployed host

requirements.story: As SEO, monetized links don't leak link equity.
requirements.text: The system SHALL set rel to include 'nofollow sponsored' on every outbound affiliate link, including the SSR deal page CTA.
acceptance: deal/[slug]/page.tsx CTA rel contains 'nofollow sponsored'
grep finds no outbound affiliate <a> lacking nofollow+sponsored

requirements.story: As an EU user, every UI string appears in my locale.
requirements.text: The system SHALL provide message keys for every user-facing feature in all 13 locale files with no missing keys.
acceptance: a key-parity check reports 0 keys present in en.json but missing in any of the other 12 locales
0 empty-string values for required keys

requirements.story: As an EU user, legal pages render in my language.
requirements.text: The system SHALL render imprint/privacy/terms via getTranslations from legal.* namespaces, with no hardcoded English literals.
acceptance: the 3 legal pages import and call next-intl translation APIs
legal.imprint/privacy/terms namespaces exist in all 13 locale files

grep finds 0 hardcoded English

/

literals in the 3 page components

requirements.story: As an EU user, the deal page chrome is localized.
requirements.text: The system SHALL localize all deal-page chrome and metadata via getTranslations('deal') with no hardcoded English strings.
acceptance: deal page uses translated keys for back-link, price-history caption, CTA, disclosure
grep finds 0 hardcoded English UI strings in deal/[slug]/page.tsx

requirements.story: As an EU user, footer links and cookie-settings are localized.
requirements.text: The system SHALL render footer legal link labels and a Cookie Settings control from localized keys in all 13 locales.
acceptance: footer.imprint/privacy/terms/cookieSettings keys exist in all 13 files
Footer renders 4 links via t()

requirements.story: As a subscriber, the unsubscribe pages render in my language.
requirements.text: The system SHALL render unsubscribe confirmation/error pages from localized keys using a locale carried in the unsubscribe URL.
acceptance: the alert email unsubscribe URL includes &locale=<xx>
the route resolves strings via getTranslations for the parsed locale
unsubscribe namespace exists in all 13 locale files

requirements.story: As a visitor, my country is resolved at the edge with a safe default.
requirements.text: IF a request lacks the dr_location cookie and its geo header country is unsupported THEN the system SHALL set dr_location to DE.
acceptance: middleware reads X-NF-Country/x-vercel-ip-country and validates against supported set
unsupported -> cookie dr_location=DE|
resolve.ts client fallback chain remains

requirements.story: As an EU user, pages are served under my locale prefix with auto-detection.
requirements.text: The system SHALL route all pages under /<locale>/ for the 13 configured locales and auto-detect locale from Accept-Language for unprefixed requests.
acceptance: routing.ts defines 13 locales with localePrefix 'always'
an unprefixed request redirects to a detected locale prefix (HTTP 307/308)
an unknown locale segment -> notFound()

requirements.story: As compliance, privacy policy covers all six required sections.
requirements.text: The system SHALL present privacy content with 6 sections: controller, data categories, third-party processors, cookies, data-subject rights, automated unsubscribe.
acceptance: privacy namespace defines all 6 section keys
the rendered page shows 6 sections including a named processor list (hosting, Supabase, email, networks)

requirements.story: As a user, I see an affiliate disclosure next to every outbound CTA.
requirements.text: The system SHALL display a visible localized affiliate-disclosure badge adjacent to every outbound affiliate CTA on deal cards and the deal page.
acceptance: a localized SponsoredBadge renders adjacent to the CTA on every DealCard and on the deal page
badge text resolves from the 'deal' namespace (no hardcoded English)
badge is not sr-only

requirements.story: As a user, I get a compliant FOSS cookie banner.
requirements.text: The system SHALL integrate vanilla-cookieconsent@3.x with categories necessary (read-only on) and analytics (default off) initialized client-side in the root layout.
acceptance: package.json depends on vanilla-cookieconsent ^3
src/components/consent/CookieConsent.tsx initializes categories {necessary:readOnly, analytics:off}
next build exit 0 with the dependency

requirements.story: As a user, I can re-open and change my consent any time.
requirements.text: WHEN the user activates the footer Cookie Settings control THEN the system SHALL re-open the consent preferences UI.
acceptance: footer Cookie Settings calls the consent showPreferences API
changing analytics from on->off updates the stored preference

requirements.story: As a user, reject is as easy as accept and nothing tracks me first.
requirements.text: IF the user has not granted analytics consent THEN the system SHALL set no non-essential cookies, and SHALL present Accept and Reject as equal-weight controls.
acceptance: no analytics/non-essential cookie is set before an explicit Accept
Accept and Reject buttons share identical visual weight (same variant/size)

requirements.story: As a user, the footer links to all legal pages + cookie settings.
requirements.text: The system SHALL render exactly four localized footer controls: Imprint, Privacy, Terms, Cookie Settings.
acceptance: Footer renders 4 controls with locale-aware hrefs/handlers

requirements.story: As a subscriber, I get an email when a watched deal drops, on the live path.
requirements.text: WHEN the live ingestion writes a deal whose sale_price is below a subscriber's target_price THEN the system SHALL dispatch a price-drop email and set notified=true.
acceptance: the AWIN/live ingest pipeline invokes the notify pass over the upserted product_ids
a simulated drop dispatches 1 email and flips notified
notifyPriceDrops has >=1 caller reachable from the live ingest path

requirements.story: As a subscriber, every email has a working unsubscribe link + header.
requirements.text: WHEN a price-drop email is sent THEN the system SHALL include a visible HMAC unsubscribe link and List-Unsubscribe + List-Unsubscribe-Post headers.
acceptance: email HTML contains an <a> to /api/alerts/unsubscribe with email/productId/token
send request includes List-Unsubscribe and List-Unsubscribe-Post headers

requirements.story: As a mail client, one-click unsubscribe POST works.
requirements.text: WHEN a one-click unsubscribe POST hits /api/alerts/unsubscribe THEN the system SHALL verify the token, delete the subscription, and return 200 with no redirect.
acceptance: route exports POST
POST with a valid token -> 200 and row deleted
POST shares the verify+delete logic with GET

requirements.story: As a subscriber, unsubscribe is HMAC-verified and idempotent.
requirements.text: WHEN /api/alerts/unsubscribe receives a valid HMAC token THEN the system SHALL delete the matching price_alerts row and render success even if already deleted.
acceptance: invalid token -> error page, 0 deletions
valid token -> deletion + success
second valid GET -> success, no error

requirements.story: As compliance, stale subscriptions are auto-deleted.
requirements.text: WHEN the scheduled retention job runs THEN the system SHALL delete price_alerts older than the configured retention window and notified rows past a configured age.
acceptance: a scheduled job (pg_cron or CI) issues the retention DELETE
retention window is a named constant/config value
privacy policy states the retention period

requirements.story: As finance, email clicks are attributed.
requirements.text: The system SHALL use the decorated affiliate URL (not the raw shopUrl) for the price-drop email CTA.
acceptance: priceDropEmail CTA href = decorateAffiliateUrl(...)
the email link contains the network subID param

requirements.story: As the platform, signup is rate-limited per real client.
requirements.text: IF more than 5 alert signups in 1 hour originate from one trusted client IP THEN the system SHALL return HTTP 429.
acceptance: limiter keys on a trusted edge IP (not raw leftmost XFF)
counter uses atomic INCR + EXPIRE (window does not reset each write)
6th request within the hour -> 429; without Redis a warning is logged and requests pass

requirements.story: As security, signing keys are never a known default.
requirements.text: IF CRON_SECRET is absent at request time in production THEN the system SHALL refuse to sign or verify tokens rather than fall back to a hardcoded secret.
acceptance: no hardcoded production secret fallback literal remains (grep)
in production with CRON_SECRET unset a sign/verify call fails at request time (throws or returns invalid)
next build on an empty .env still exits 0 — no throw at module-load/build phase (reconciles with R-ING-7 / SC1)

requirements.story: As security, the refresh endpoint requires the cron bearer.
requirements.text: WHEN /api/refresh is called without Authorization: Bearer CRON_SECRET THEN the system SHALL return 401.
acceptance: missing/expired bearer -> 401
secret unset -> 401 (fail-closed)

requirements.story: As security, the DB is locked down to the service role.
requirements.text: The system SHALL enable RLS on all four tables and use the service-role key only in server-only modules.
acceptance: RLS enabled on deals/price_alerts/price_history/transactions
supabase client module imports 'server-only'; key never NEXT_PUBLIC

requirements.story: As security, user input cannot alter DB filters.
requirements.text: IF a user-controlled value (e.g. city from cookie) is used in a PostgREST filter THEN the system SHALL sanitize/encode it so it cannot change the filter structure.
acceptance: city is sanitized to a safe charset (matching the search-token rule) before .or() interpolation, or passed via a parameterized filter
a crafted city value cannot inject an extra filter clause (unit/integration test)

requirements.story: As security, secret/token comparisons are timing-safe.
requirements.text: The system SHALL compare all shared secrets and tokens using a constant-time comparison.
acceptance: unsubscribe token verify uses timingSafeEqual (already)
postback and refresh secret checks use timingSafeEqual over length-guarded buffers

requirements.story: As compliance, we store no avoidable PII and no geo coordinates.
requirements.text: The system SHALL store no PII in transactions and SHALL not persist geo coordinates.
acceptance: transactions columns contain no email/name/IP
no code writes lat/long to any table

requirements.story: As a visitor, hot deal queries are cached.
requirements.text: The system SHALL cache /api/deals responses in Redis with a 1800s (30-min) TTL and serve a cache hit when present.
acceptance: cacheKey/cacheGet/cacheSet used in /api/deals
CACHE_TTL_SECONDS resolves to 1800 (e.g. 30 * 60)
a second identical request returns cached:true when Redis configured

requirements.story: As a visitor, list queries hit indexes.
requirements.text: The system SHALL index the hot query paths (country+discount, country+category, slug, ean_code, price_history(product_id,recorded_at), transactions(product_id)).
acceptance: schema defines all listed indexes
no hot read uses a full-table scan (EXPLAIN spot-check)

requirements.story: As ops, the schema is reproducibly applied to any environment.
requirements.text: WHEN the migration runner/CI step executes THEN the system SHALL apply the schema (tables, indexes, trigger, RPC) idempotently.
acceptance: a package script or CI job applies supabase/schema.sql (or versioned migrations)
re-running is idempotent (IF NOT EXISTS / OR REPLACE)
post-apply checks confirm the trigger and the 90-day RPC exist

requirements.story: As ops, degradation is visible in logs.
requirements.text: WHEN a provider, Supabase, Redis, or email integration is unconfigured THEN the system SHALL log a structured warning naming the missing capability.
acceptance: providers, Supabase, and email log a named warning when their env is absent (regression-verified in build log)
the rate limiter additionally logs a named warning when Redis is unconfigured (new — currently silent)

requirements.story: As a maintainer, core pure logic is unit-tested.
requirements.text: The system SHALL provide passing unit tests for slugify, HMAC token gen/verify, affiliate decoration, and hybrid dedup.
acceptance: a test runner (vitest) is configured with a package script
tests cover the 3 dedup cases + slug edge cases + token round-trip + subID round-trip
the suite exits 0

requirements.story: As a maintainer, the build is type-clean and warning-free.
requirements.text: The system SHALL build with tsc --noEmit and next build both exiting 0 with no new warnings.
acceptance: tsc --noEmit exit 0
next build exit 0
no new build warnings vs baseline

requirements.story: As a maintainer, lint is configured and enforced.
requirements.text: The system SHALL provide a committed ESLint config (next/core-web-vitals) so next lint runs non-interactively and exits 0.
acceptance: .eslintrc present and committed
next lint runs without the interactive setup prompt and exits 0

requirements.story: As a visitor, data views show empty/loading/error states.
requirements.text: WHILE a data view has no results, is loading, or has errored the system SHALL render an explicit empty, loading, or error state.
acceptance: search/category render a non-blank empty state for 0 results
an API error path renders a user-visible error (not a blank page)

requirements.story: As an assistive-tech user, the UI meets WCAG 2.1 AA basics.
requirements.text: The system SHALL meet WCAG 2.1 AA basics: labeled controls, alt text, focus-visible, and AA contrast on primary text/CTAs.
acceptance: interactive controls have accessible names (axe scan: 0 critical violations on home + deal page)
images have alt; CTA contrast ratio >= 4.5:1

components.name: StrackrProvider
components.responsibility: Live Strackr fetch + normalization + mock fallback

components.name: Provider registry
components.responsibility: Register Strackr; explicit equal-price priority tie-break

components.name: Providers + ingest normalizers
components.responsibility: Populate eanCode/gtin where exposed

components.name: AWIN ingest script
components.responsibility: Write slug + metadata cols; invoke live-path notify; reuse discount guard

components.name: Supabase schema
components.responsibility: slug NOT NULL + backfill; trigger daily-fill; transactions integrity; indexes; RLS; no-PII

components.name: deals.repo
components.responsibility: slug generation parity; getDealBySlug; city sanitization; historical-low guard

components.name: Refresh route
components.responsibility: Bounded-concurrency fan-out; 90-day low; bearer auth

components.name: alerts.repo
components.responsibility: Live-path notify; decorated email CTA; locale in unsubscribe URL

components.name: Unsubscribe route
components.responsibility: GET + POST one-click; idempotent delete; localized pages

components.name: Alerts API
components.responsibility: Trusted-IP atomic rate limiting

components.name: Redis layer
components.responsibility: Atomic INCR/EXPIRE primitive; 30-min cache TTL; warn when unconfigured

components.name: Postbacks route
components.responsibility: Timing-safe auth; network-aware subID; status/commission validation; persist subid3/raw_payload; no PII

components.name: Crypto util
components.responsibility: No default secret in prod; timing-safe compares

components.name: Affiliate util
components.responsibility: Unified subID; lossless productId encoding

components.name: SSR deal page
components.responsibility: AggregateOffer+itemCondition JSON-LD; proof fields; hreflang; rel sponsored; localized chrome; badge

components.name: DealCard
components.responsibility: SSR link; remove dead modal; visible affiliate badge

components.name: SponsoredBadge
components.responsibility: Localized affiliate-disclosure badge (fix namespace)

components.name: Sitemap
components.responsibility: Canonical LOCALES; Supabase slugs; hreflang; all countries

components.name: robots.txt
components.responsibility: AI-bot allow groups; Disallow /api/; sitemap

components.name: Legal pages
components.responsibility: getTranslations; 6-section privacy; real imprint data

components.name: CookieConsent (FOSS)
components.responsibility: vanilla-cookieconsent init; categories; equal-weight; re-open API

components.name: Footer
components.responsibility: 4 localized links incl. Cookie Settings re-open

components.name: Locale catalogs
components.responsibility: legal/unsubscribe/footer/badge/proof keys across 13 locales (machine-translated)

components.name: Middleware
components.responsibility: Edge geo + default DE; locale routing/detection

components.name: Retention job
components.responsibility: Scheduled price_alerts purge

components.name: Migration runner
components.responsibility: Reproducible schema apply + post-checks

components.name: Unit test suite
components.responsibility: vitest config + tests for pure logic

components.name: ESLint config
components.responsibility: Committed next/core-web-vitals config

components.name: Build/type gate
components.responsibility: tsc + next build green

components.name: Data-view states
components.responsibility: Empty/loading/error states

components.name: Accessibility pass
components.responsibility: axe-clean home + deal page

tasks.title: Schema: slug NOT NULL (+BEFORE-INSERT default) + one-time backfill UPDATE; confirm RLS on all 4 tables + hot-path indexes
tasks.verification: SELECT count(*) FROM deals WHERE slug IS NULL -> 0; RLS enabled on deals/price_alerts/price_history/transactions; all listed indexes present; re-run schema idempotent

tasks.title: ingest-awin.cjs normalizeRow writes slug (canonical rule) + ean_code/metadata cols; discount via shared guard
tasks.verification: dry-run prints rows with non-empty slug; assert generated slug == deals.repo toRow() for same input; discount uses the shared guard (no unguarded inline %)

tasks.title: Live-path price-drop notify: invoke notify over upserted product_ids from the ingest pipeline (or /api/refresh-alerts called by the Action); assert email retains unsubscribe link + List-Unsubscribe headers
tasks.verification: integration: seed a price_alert, run ingest with a lower price -> 1 email dispatched + notified=true; email HTML has unsubscribe <a> and List-Unsubscribe + List-Unsubscribe-Post headers

tasks.title: Add POST one-click handler to unsubscribe route sharing HMAC verify+delete with GET (idempotent)
tasks.verification: curl -X POST '<unsub-url>' -> 200 and row deleted; invalid token -> error, 0 deletions; GET still 200; second call idempotent

tasks.title: Spine smoke: ingest -> open the deal page by its written slug -> trigger alert -> POST unsubscribe; bogus slug -> 404
tasks.verification: scripted E2E over the 4 steps returns 200/sent/deleted with no 404; /<locale>/deal/<bogus> returns HTTP 404

tasks.title: Add legal.* + unsubscribe + footer + badge + proof message keys to en.json (source of truth)
tasks.verification: en.json defines all new namespaces; key-parity script lists the 12 locales as missing (pre-translation)

tasks.title: Machine-translate new keys into the other 12 locales; flag binding legal copy + real Impressum for legal review
tasks.verification: key-parity script reports 0 missing keys across 13 locales; a TODO marker lists keys needing legal sign-off

tasks.title: Refactor imprint/privacy/terms to getTranslations + setRequestLocale; privacy to 6 sections; remove hardcoded English + dead import
tasks.verification: /de/privacy renders German; grep 0 hardcoded English literals; privacy shows 6 sections

tasks.title: Add vanilla-cookieconsent@^3; create src/components/consent/CookieConsent.tsx (necessary readOnly, analytics off); mount in root layout; remove custom banner
tasks.verification: incognito shows banner; no non-essential cookie pre-Accept; next build exit 0

tasks.title: Footer: 4 localized controls incl. Cookie Settings dispatching showPreferences
tasks.verification: Footer renders 4 controls; clicking Cookie Settings re-opens consent and toggling analytics persists

tasks.title: Deal page JSON-LD -> Product+AggregateOffer (lowPrice/highPrice/offerCount) + itemCondition NewCondition
tasks.verification: Rich Results Test: 0 errors; grep finds AggregateOffer + itemCondition

tasks.title: Deal page: visible localized 90-day-low + 'Verified at .. CET' proof fields; fix fromRow historical_low_price != null read
tasks.verification: page source contains both strings; neither is sr-only/display:none; a deal with historical_low_price=0 still renders the proof line (no null-collapse)

tasks.title: Deal page: localize chrome + metadata; add alternates.languages (13) + x-default; CTA rel 'nofollow sponsored'
tasks.verification: /de/deal/* chrome German; metadata.languages has 13 entries; CTA rel contains nofollow+sponsored

tasks.title: rate limit: trusted edge IP + atomic INCR/EXPIRE (or @upstash/ratelimit); warn when Redis unconfigured; confirm 30-min cache TTL on /api/deals
tasks.verification: 6th request -> 429 under concurrency; XFF spoof ineffective; no-Redis logs warning + passes; CACHE_TTL_SECONDS resolves to 1800 (30*60) and /api/deals returns cached:true on 2nd identical request
